hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.user_prompt // ""')
if echo "$prompt" | grep -qEi '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sk-ant-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|xoxb-[a-zA-Z0-9-]+|xoxp-[a-zA-Z0-9-]+|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY)'; then
  echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in prompt' >&2
  echo '[Hook] Detected pattern matching API key, token, or private key' >&2
  exit 2
fi
echo "$input"

UserPromptSubmit.description: Block prompts containing potential secrets (API keys, tokens, private keys)

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Block creation of unnecessary documentation files
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')

if [[ "$file_path" =~ \.(md|txt)$ ]] && [[ ! "$file_path" =~ (README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING)\.md$ ]]; then
  echo "[Hook] BLOCKED: Unnecessary documentation file creation" >&2
  echo "[Hook] File: $file_path" >&2
  echo "[Hook] Use README.md for documentation instead" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "$input"

PreToolUse.description: Block creation of random .md files - keeps docs consolidated

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
# Audit logging for security-relevant tool invocations (Write/Edit/Bash)
input=$(cat)
tool_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // .tool // "unknown"')
audit_enabled="${CLAUDE_AUDIT_ENABLED:-true}"
if [ "$audit_enabled" = "false" ]; then echo "$input"; exit 0; fi
case "$tool_name" in
  Write|Edit|Bash)
    ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null)
    cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null | head -c 200)
    target="${fp:-$cmd}"
    printf '{"ts":"%s","tool":"%s","target":"%s"}\n' "$ts" "$tool_name" "$target" >> "${TMPDIR}/claude-audit-$(date +%Y%m%d).jsonl"
    ;;
esac
echo "$input"

PostToolUse.description: Audit log security-relevant tool invocations (Write/Edit/Bash) to $TMPDIR/claude-audit-*.jsonl
